text: I'd like to make an appointment.
description: 预约看病的标准开场。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'd like to make an appointment to see Dr. Williams.","zh":"我想预约看威廉姆斯医生。"}]

text: Can you help me with...?
description: 请求帮助的礼貌说法。预约时常见开场。

text: Is Dr. Williams available this week?
meaning: 威廉姆斯医生这周有空吗？
description: 询问医生是否有可预约的时间。available = 有空的。
examples_json: [{"en":"Is Dr. Williams available this Friday?","zh":"威廉姆斯医生这周五有空吗？"}]

text: I'd like to see a doctor as soon as possible.
description: 表达紧急性。不舒服想尽快就诊。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm not feeling well. I'd like to see a doctor as soon as possible.","zh":"我不太舒服，想尽快看医生。"}]

text: I need to reschedule my appointment.
description: 改期的标准说法。reschedule = 重新安排时间。
examples_json: [{"en":"I need to reschedule my appointment from Friday to Monday.","zh":"我需要把预约从周五改到周一。"}]

text: I'm sorry but I need to cancel.
description: 取消预约。提前取消不要no-show。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm sorry, but I need to cancel my appointment for tomorrow.","zh":"抱歉，我需要取消明天的预约。"}]

text: Can I get a refund for the cancellation?
description: 有些诊所取消预约需付费，提前确认。
examples_json: [{"en":"Is there a cancellation fee?","zh":"取消有费用吗？"}]

text: I have an appointment at 10 AM.
description: 到前台登记时报预约时间。
examples_json: [{"en":"Hi, I have an appointment at 10 AM with Dr. Williams.","zh":"你好，我上午10点约了威廉姆斯医生。"}]

text: Here is my insurance card.
description: 出示保险卡。在英美国家每次就诊都需要。
examples_json: [{"en":"Here is my insurance card and ID.","zh":"这是我的保险卡和身份证。"}]

text: Do I need to fill out any forms?
description: 首次就诊需填patient information form(病人信息表)。

text: I haven't been feeling well.
description: 描述病情的通用开场。比I'm sick更自然。
examples_json: [{"en":"I haven't been feeling well for a few days.","zh":"我几天来一直不太舒服。"}]

text: I have a headache and a fever.
description: 描述两个常见症状。and连接多个症状。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have a headache, a fever, and a sore throat.","zh":"我头痛、发烧、喉咙痛。"}]

text: I've been coughing a lot.
description: 描述持续症状。have been + doing = 一直在。
examples_json: [{"en":"I've been coughing a lot, especially at night.","zh":"我一直咳得很厉害，尤其是晚上。"}]

text: It hurts when I swallow.
description: 描述具体疼痛情况。
examples_json: [{"en":"My throat hurts when I swallow.","zh":"我吞东西的时候喉咙疼。"}]

text: It started three days ago.
description: 回答症状何时开始。it started + 时间。
examples_json: [{"en":"It started three days ago after I came back from a trip.","zh":"三天前我旅行回来后开始的。"}]

text: I'm allergic to penicillin.
description: 说明药物过敏史。非常重要一定要说。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm allergic to penicillin. Is this medication safe for me?","zh":"我对青霉素过敏，这药我能吃吗？"}]

text: I've taken some painkillers but they didn't help.
meaning: 我吃了一些止痛药但没有用。
description: 说明已尝试的治疗和效果。
examples_json: [{"en":"I've taken ibuprofen but it didn't help much.","zh":"我吃了布洛芬但没什么用。"}]

text: No I don't have any other medical conditions.
description: 回答是否有其他病史。medical conditions = 疾病。
examples_json: [{"en":"No, I don't have any other medical conditions.","zh":"没有，我没有其他疾病。"}]

text: What exactly is wrong with me?
description: 直接询问诊断结果。比问得更直接。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can you tell me exactly what's wrong with me?","zh":"能告诉我到底是什么问题吗？"}]

text: Is it serious?
description: 担心病情是否严重。医生会用not serious/mild/severe来描述。
examples_json: [{"en":"Is it serious? Do I need to be worried?","zh":"严重吗？我需要担心吗？"}]

text: Do I need any tests?
description: 询问是否需要进一步检查。blood test = 血检，X-ray = X光。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do I need any tests to find out what's wrong?","zh"::我需要做检查来确定是什么问题吗？"}]

text: What do you recommend?
description: 询问医生的治疗建议。
examples_json: [{"en":"What do you recommend for my condition?","zh":"针对我的情况你有什么建议？"}]

text: How many times a day should I take this?
description: 询问用药频率。
examples_json: [{"en":"How many times a day should I take this medicine?","zh":"这个药一天吃几次？"}]

text: Should I come back for a follow-up?
description: 询问是否需要复诊。follow-up = 复诊。
examples_json: [{"en":"Should I come back for a follow-up if it doesn't get better?","zh":"如果没好我需要回来复诊吗？"}]

text: Are there any side effects?
description: 询问药物可能的副作用。
examples_json: [{"en":"Are there any common side effects I should know about?","zh":"有什么常见的副作用我需要知道吗？"}]

text: Do you have something for a cold?
description: 在药房描述需求。something for + 症状。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do you have something for a cold and cough?","zh":"有治感冒咳嗽的药吗？"}]

text: Can you recommend something for a headache?
description: 请药剂师推荐药品。recommend = 推荐。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can you recommend something for a headache?","zh":"能推荐治头痛的药吗？"}]

text: Is this available over-the-counter?
description: 询问是否需要处方。OTC = over-the-counter。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do I need a prescription for this or is it over-the-counter?","zh":"这个需要处方还是非处方？"}]

text: How often should I take this?
description: 询问用药频率。take [number] times a day。
examples_json: [{"en":"How often should I take this medicine?","zh":"这个药多久吃一次？"}]

text: Should I take it with food?
description: 有些药需要随餐服用减少胃部不适。
examples_json: [{"en":"Should I take this with food or on an empty stomach?","zh":"这个需要随餐服用还是空腹？"}]

text: Can I drink alcohol while taking this?
description: 很多抗生素不能喝酒。直接问药剂师。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I drink alcohol while taking this medication?","zh":"吃这个药能喝酒吗？"}]

text: I'm here to pick up a prescription.
description: 凭处方取药的标准说法。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm here to pick up a prescription for Liam.","zh":"我来取利亚姆的处方药。"}]

text: How much does it cost?
description: 问价格。有保险可能co-pay(自付额)很少。
examples_json: [{"en":"How much does it cost with insurance?","zh":"用保险的话多少钱？"}]

text: Do you have a generic version?
description: 问有没有便宜一些的仿制药。brand name = 品牌药。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do you have a generic version? It's cheaper right?","zh":"有仿制药吗？便宜一些对吧？"}]

text: I need an ambulance please!
description: 紧急情况下叫救护车。保持冷静说明位置。
examples_json: [{"en":"I need an ambulance! My friend is unconscious.","zh":"我需要救护车！我的朋友失去意识了。"}]

text: There's been an accident.
description: 报告事故。accident = 意外/事故。
examples_json: [{"en":"There's been a car accident. Someone is injured.","zh":"发生了车祸，有人受伤了。"}]

text: What's your location?
description: 急救接线员会问你的具体位置。address / landmark。
examples_json: [{"en":"What's your current location?","zh":"你现在的位置在哪？"}]

text: I have severe chest pain.
description: 紧急分诊最严重的描述之一。chest pain = 胸痛。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have severe chest pain and difficulty breathing.","zh":"我胸口剧痛而且呼吸困难。"}]

text: On a scale of 1 to 10 the pain is about...
description: 用数字描述疼痛程度。分诊必问题。
examples_json: [{"en":"On a scale of 1 to 10, the pain is about 8.","zh":"从1到10的话，痛感大概是8。"}]

text: Can you tell me your medical history?
description: 分诊护士会询问病史。包括慢性病、过敏、用药。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do you have any medical history I should know about?","zh":"你有什么病史需要告诉我吗？"}]
